response.justification: The candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer whose recent and core experience centers on Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang rather than C++. C++/C exposure is limited and dated (NI LabWindows/CVI components and a university audio thesis), falling well short of the 5–10 years of strong, Windows-based C++ the role mandates. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain work paired with C++ — the brief Germany 'investment practices' role used Node/GraphQL, not C++. The mismatch on the mandatory C++/Windows, database, and domain requirements makes this candidate unsuitable for the position.
strengths: Broad multi-language, full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Some hands-on C/C++ exposure via NI LabWindows/CVI and an audio-synthesis thesis
concerns: No strong, recent, or sustained C++ development on Windows (core mandatory requirement unmet)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database skills limited to MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed-income or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience combined with C++
